titleStmt.title: SII 26.59: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 59. (A.R. No. 57 of 1909.) TIRUKKAḺUKKUṈṞAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the kitchen in the Bhaktavatsalēśvara temple, left of entrance.
The details of date given, viz. Ś. 1328, Viyaya, Tulā śu. 15, Wednesday, Aśvati correspond to 1406 A.D. October 27. The nakshatra ended on the previous day at ·40.

It records the royal gift of the village Jananāthanallūr alias Śirudaiyūr situated in Āyiravēlippaṟṟu in Āmūr-kōṭṭam as kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadāṉa and as tax-free sarvamānya, far Bokkarāyaṉ-śandhi (after the king), in and for the repairs to the temple of Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuḍaiya-nāyinār of Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam a taṉiyūr in Kaḷattūr-kkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalīśvaran hariraāya vibhāṭan bhāṣaikku tappuvarāyarakaṇṭan muvaraāyakaṇṭan rājādhirājarājaparameśvaran vīrapratāpa pokkarāyarkku cellāṉiṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 2 10 8ṉmel vyayavaraṣattu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvapa[kṣat]tu pūrṇamaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūr koṭṭattu taṉiyūr tirukkaḻukkuṉṟattu Uṭaiyār tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuṭaiyaṉāyinārkku pokkarāyaṉ cantikku Irāyar Aruḷi ceytapaṭikku kuṭiṉiṅkā tevatāṉamāka Āmur koṭṭattu Āyiravevipaṟṟil cenanātanallūrāṉa ciṟutaiyūrkku Ellaiyāvatu
kiḻpārkkellai tāḻampaḷḷattukku meṟku tenpārkellai taḻuvacūḻaintanallūrkku vaṭakkum melpārkellai maṭayattūr Accalampākkattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai koṇṭampākkattukku teṟkum Iṉṉāyinār tirunāmattukkāṇi toṇṭarkaḷnāyakaviḷākam Uḷpaṭa
Uḷḷur nayinār pūteri Āṇṭār perumāḷ stānamānnam niṅkalāka Ivūr ta nañcai nilam puñcai nilam kollai puṟavaṭai Ēriyum Ēriniroṭu kālum maramum kiṇaṟum maṉṟum kaṉṟumepāḻum Uḷpaṭa dharmmasāsanam paṇṇi kuṭuttu Ivūril kaṭamai poṉvari vācalvari māvaṭai
maravaṭai Ērimiṉ vilai tiruvācalil piṟakkum paḻavari putuvari sakalaprāptikaḷum tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyiṉārku pokkarāyan canWritten below.tikkum tiruppaṇikkum sarva mānnya Iṟaiyiliyāka canndrātittavaraiyum cellumpaṭikku cilārekai paṇṇi kuṭutteṉ ṣa baraha §
Digital edition of SII 26.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
